ddls:
CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the platform was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the platform was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that the media is associated with */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the media was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the media was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that the URL is associated with */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL associated with the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the URL was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the URL was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the post (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "entities" TEXT /* Entities mentioned in the post (e.g., people, organizations, locations) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that the version is associated with */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was assigned the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
